- [x] `EVALR-025` Add metamorphic prompt-perturbation generator for equivalent local-file, web, policy-denied, empty-result, and frustrated-follow-up cases. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_metamorphic_guard.rs::metamorphic_prompt_perturbation_generator_contract`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_metamorphic_cases.json`.
- [x] `EVALR-026` Add metamorphic consistency scoring that compares route, workflow, tool, and final-answer behavior across equivalent prompt variants. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_metamorphic_guard.rs::metamorphic_consistency_scoring_contract`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_metamorphic_guard_current.json::summary`.
- [x] `EVALR-027` Add tool-list, path-style, ordering, and missing-capability perturbation guard to detect brittle routing and schema assumptions. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_metamorphic_guard.rs::metamorphic_brittle_assumption_guard_contract`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_metamorphic_guard_current.json::brittle_failures`.
- [x] `EVALR-028` Add consolidated RSI eval promotion ladder policy covering calibrated judge confidence, human agreement, trace localization, replay pass, and unresolved-issue thresholds. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_rsi_promotion_ladder.json`, `surface/orchestration/src/eval_rsi_promotion_guard.rs::rsi_eval_promotion_ladder_policy_contract`.
- [x] `EVALR-029` Wire the RSI promotion ladder into eval runtime so self-improvement escalation is blocked unless every required eval proof is fresh and passing. ### P0 (Eval To 10 RSI Readiness Backlog — 2026-04-24)
- [x] `EVAL10-001` Persist a canonical orchestration phase trace for every live chat/workflow turn, not just dashboard snapshot collector runs; evidence should land under `surface/orchestration/**` plus `local/state/ops/orchestration/workflow_phase_trace_latest.json`. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_final_runtime.rs::run_phase_trace_persist`, `local/state/ops/orchestration/workflow_phase_trace_latest.json`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_phase_trace_persist_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-002` Expand the phase trace schema to include user intent, selected workflow, selected model, tool decision, tool family, tool result summary, finalization status, fallback path, latency, receipts, and normalized failure codes. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/telemetry.rs`, `surface/orchestration/src/bin/workflow_phase_trace_from_snapshot.rs`, `planes/contracts/orchestration/workflow_phase_trace_v1.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-003` Add a phase-trace completeness guard that fails when eval-visible turns lack required phase fields or receipt correlation. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/workflow_phase_trace_guard.rs`, `npm run -s ops:orchestration:phase-trace:guard`.
- [x] `EVAL10-004` Build a gold dataset from recent real failures: hallucination, wrong tool, no response, repeated boilerplate, automatic-tool-selection claims, policy-block confusion, bad workflow selection, and non-actionable feedback. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_gold_dataset_v1.jsonl`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_issue_taxonomy_v1.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-005` Add a gold-dataset coverage guard requiring at least one positive and one negative example for every critical eval failure class. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_gold_dataset_guard.rs`, `npm run -s ops:eval:gold-dataset:schema:guard`.
- [x] `EVAL10-006` Add an orchestration-owned LLM judge lane that reviews sampled turns against phase traces and emits verdict, issue class, severity, evidence, proposed fix, confidence, and issue-readiness. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_judge_lane.rs`, `npm run -s ops:eval:judge-lane:guard`.
- [x] `EVAL10-007` Ensure the LLM judge lane always uses a strong eligible model and records model source, threshold decision, and fallback reason. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_judge_lane.rs`, `artifacts/eval_judge_lane_latest.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-008` Ground LLM judge outputs against structured receipts and raw turn text, with a guard blocking unsupported judge claims. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_judge_lane.rs`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_judge_lane_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-009` Add human reviewer feedback ingestion for accepted, rejected, partial, and missed eval findings. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_runtime.rs::reviewer-feedback`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_reviewer_feedback_sample.jsonl`, `npm run -s ops:eval:reviewer:weekly:ingest`.
- [x] `EVAL10-010` Add calibration metrics over reviewer feedback: precision, recall, false positives, false negatives, severity calibration, and drift over time. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_runtime.rs::run_reviewer_feedback`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_reviewer_feedback_weekly_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-011` Add an eval quality gate that blocks RSI promotion when calibration metrics are below threshold or signal is insufficient. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/bin/eval_runtime.rs::quality-gate`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_quality_gate_v1_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-012` Require every issue draft to include exact evidence, affected owner/component, suspected root cause, acceptance criteria, suggested test, and replay command. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_issue_runtime.rs::run_issue_drafts`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_issue_drafts_current.json`, `cargo run --quiet --manifest-path surface/orchestration/Cargo.toml --bin eval_runtime -- issue-drafts --strict=1`.
- [x] `EVAL10-013` Generate or link replay fixtures automatically whenever eval flags a persistent high-severity issue. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_issue_runtime.rs::write_replay_fixture`, `local/state/ops/eval_replay_fixtures/*.json`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_issue_drafts_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-014` Add a replay runner that can reproduce flagged eval failures from fixtures and emit pass/fail evidence. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_issue_runtime.rs::run_replay`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_replay_runner_current.json`, `cargo run --quiet --manifest-path surface/orchestration/Cargo.toml --bin eval_runtime -- replay --strict=1`.
- [x] `EVAL10-015` Add before/after patch verification so eval can classify fixes as fixed, partially fixed, unresolved, or regression-risk. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_lifecycle_runtime.rs::run_fix_verification`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_fix_verification_before.json`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_fix_verification_after.json`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_fix_verification_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-016` Wire eval issue lifecycle: draft issue, human approval, GitHub filing, patch link, replay verification, and closure score. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_lifecycle_runtime.rs::run_issue_lifecycle`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_issue_lifecycle_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-017` Expand adversarial evals for tricky routing cases: local-file intent that sounds like web, web intent mentioning files, policy-denied vs unavailable tools, empty tool results, and frustrated follow-up turns. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_final_runtime.rs::run_adversarial_routing`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_adversarial_routing_cases.json`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_adversarial_routing_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-018` Add workflow-selection quality scoring: whether the selected workflow was appropriate, whether a simpler workflow would have sufficed, and whether recovery/escalation was justified. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_final_runtime.rs::run_workflow_selection`, `surface/orchestration/fixtures/eval/eval_workflow_selection_cases.json`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_workflow_selection_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-019` Promote eval runtime ownership out of test-only tooling so the vital RSI evaluator can run from orchestration/kernel-owned runtime paths even when shell/tests are stripped away. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_final_runtime.rs::run_runtime_ownership`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_runtime_ownership_current.json`.
- [x] `EVAL10-020` Add an RSI escalation gate requiring consecutive clean eval passes, fresh phase traces, passing replay fixtures, acceptable human calibration, and no unresolved high-severity eval issues. Evidence: `surface/orchestration/src/eval_lifecycle_runtime.rs::run_rsi_escalation`, `core/local/artifacts/eval_rsi_escalation_gate_current.json`.

- 2026-04-22 increment notes:
- `V11-INSTALL-005`: added parser-unsafe escaped Join-Path rejection + literal-path forced repair wrapper writes + bootstrap copy contract tightening in installer repair artifact checks.
- `V11-FILE-001`: ingress parser now recognizes local directory/file-tooling phrasing as workspace read-intent signals.
- `V11-FILE-002`: ingress parser now promotes directory/folder payload keys and Windows/backslash path strings into workspace target descriptors.
- `V11-FILE-003`: workflow fallback now emits explicit file-tooling validation guidance instead of repeated retry templates for policy-denied lane turns.
- `V11-TOOL-006`: typed-probe CI matrix now fail-closes parser regressions for workspace directory vocabulary/keys and Windows path detection.
- `V11-TOOL-006`: `run_infring_ops` bridge path now explicitly hard-locks production process fallback (`INFRING_OPS_ALLOW_PROCESS_FALLBACK=0`) and SDK process transport (`INFRING_SDK_ALLOW_PROCESS_TRANSPORT=0`), with matching CI guard enforcement in `transport_convergence_guard.ts` and `legacy_process_runner_release_guard.ts`.
- `V11-TOOL-006`: typed-probe CI matrix now requires full all-capability missing-field reason coverage (`tool_available` + `transport_available` across workspace/web/tool_route), ingress typed-surface regressions now include missing `workspace_read` field diagnostics plus missing `web_search.transport_available`, and parser workspace alias extraction now includes `repository_root`/`repository_roots` across signal + target-descriptor paths.
- `V11-TOOL-006`: parser structured-target kind aliases now include `repo_path`/`repository_path`/`repository_root`/`workspace_root`/`root_path`/`working_directory`/`current_directory`, with fail-closed CI coverage in `typed_probe_contract_matrix_guard.ts` (`typed_probe_contract_matrix_parser_structured_target_kind_aliases`) to prevent workspace-tool route misclassification regressions.
- `V11-INSTALL-005`: windows installer contract guard now fail-closes variable-interpolated `Join-Path` regex hazards (`windows_install_script_no_parser_unsafe_variable_interpolated_join_path_regex`) and resolves merge-marker/parser-unsafe false positives via line-marker-aware detection and `-match`-scoped escaped Join-Path checks in `windows_installer_contract_guard.ts` (validated by `ops:windows-installer:contract:guard` strict pass).
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: fallback policy diagnostics now distinguish ingress domain-boundary blocks for direct actionable user guidance.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: workflow-response pass now short-circuits local workspace/tooling turns away from generic runtime-capability boilerplate, forces local-policy/direct-answer guidance on runtime-denial edges, and rewrites runtime-capability template echoes during local workspace validation turns.
- `V11-WEB-007`: evidence extraction now suppresses runtime capability-surface boilerplate (`I can access runtime telemetry...`) as non-evidence chrome to prevent scaffold leakage into synthesis.
- `V11-WEB-008`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now enforces provider-failure mode contracts, cache-skip reason presence, and fail-closed cache-write gating when provider failures exist (with dedicated counters, thresholds, gate checks, and soak-derived contract report surface).
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction guard now suppresses benchmark/instruction snippet leakage (`Next actions` template + `ops:benchmark:*` command scaffolds), and fixture matrix now includes dedicated benchmark/instruction contamination regressions for both search and fetch modes.
- `V11-WEB-008`: web tooling context soak report now normalizes explicit provider/cache contract fields (`provider_failures`, `cache_skipped`, `cache_skip_reason`, `cache_write_allowed`, `cache_write_attempted`) so reliability gates consume deterministic fail-closed telemetry even when upstream markers are sparse.
- `V11-WEB-008`: web tooling context soak now fail-closes on taxonomy contract violations (provider failure mode allowlist drift, cache skip without explicit reason, cache-write allowed/attempted during provider-failure states) and publishes `taxonomy_contract` in schema v4 report output.
- `V11-WEB-008`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now consumes soak `taxonomy_contract`/taxonomy quality counters and fail-closes nonzero workflow-loop leakage + file-tool-route misdirection (`workflow_loop_leak_count`, `file_tool_route_misdirection_count`) with dedicated counters, thresholds, gate checks, and failure IDs in reliability artifacts.
- `V11-WEB-009`: core evidence extractor now classifies benchmark command scaffolds (`ops:benchmark:*`) and canned fallback `Next actions` templates as interface chrome to prevent synthesis contamination.
- `V11-WEB-007`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now enforces metadata-card keyset suppression (`title/excerpt/originalUrl/featuredContent`) and raw `<function=...>` scaffold suppression with dedicated leak counters + zero-threshold gate checks, and fixture coverage now includes metadata-card and raw-function scaffold contamination regressions.
- `V11-WEB-007`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses blocked tool-trace scaffolds (`Tool trace complete`, `done · 1 blocked`, `File List blocked`, ingress-policy trace payloads) with dedicated leak counters/threshold checks and fixture coverage, and core evidence extraction now classifies file-list blocked trace templates as interface chrome.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction guard now suppresses policy-gate outage template leakage (`This is a policy gate, not a web-provider outage` + file-list blocked preamble variants), fixture coverage now includes the outage-template regression shape, and core evidence extraction classifies policy-gate outage scaffolds as interface chrome.
- `V11-WEB-007`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses runtime capability-surface boilerplate templates (`I can access runtime telemetry...approved command surfaces...`, `Tell me what you want me to check and I will run it now`) with dedicated leak counter + zero-threshold gate check (`web_runtime_capability_template_suppression`) to fail-close capability-template contamination in web synthesis inputs.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses retry-loop workflow templates (`Please retry so I can rerun the chain cleanly`, `Ask me to continue and I will synthesize from [the] recorded workflow state`) with dedicated leak counter + zero-threshold gate check (`web_workflow_retry_template_suppression`) to fail-close repetitive workflow-boilerplate contamination in web evidence paths.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now tracks dedicated suppression for unexpected-workflow/final-reply boilerplate templates (`I completed the workflow gate...final workflow state was unexpected`, `I completed the run...final reply did not render`) via `workflow_unexpected_state_template_leak_count` and fail-closed zero-threshold gate `web_workflow_unexpected_state_template_suppression`.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses source/receipt scaffold leakage (`[source:local_context]`, `[source:tool_receipt:*]`) via sanitizer stripping plus dedicated zero-threshold gate `web_source_receipt_scaffold_suppression` (`source_receipt_scaffold_leak_count`) so citation scaffold text cannot contaminate user-facing synthesis outputs.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses tool-routing diagnosis boilerplate templates (`automatic tool triggering without conscious selection`, `fundamental misclassification error`, `tool routing mechanism is clearly malfunctioning`, `requires recalibration...internal vs external operations`) via dedicated leak counter + zero-threshold gate `web_tool_routing_diagnosis_template_suppression` (`tool_routing_diagnosis_template_leak_count`) to fail-close diagnostic-template contamination in synthesis evidence.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction guard now suppresses route-classification boilerplate templates (`The first gate ("workflow_route"/"task_or_info_route") ... "info" route rather than "task" route`, `needs explicit tool-related phrasing to trigger the task classification path`, `conversational exchange rather than a tool operation request`) and fixture coverage now includes a dedicated route-classification contamination case.
- `V11-WEB-009`: core evidence extractor now classifies route-classification + tool-routing diagnosis templates as interface chrome (`first gate` + `workflow_route/task_or_info_route` info-vs-task diagnostics, task-classification-path prompts, misclassification diagnostics) to prevent workflow-route leakage into synthesis evidence.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: shell truth-leak policy now fail-closes route-classification boilerplate signatures via `workflow_route_info_task_classification_boilerplate` and `workflow_route_task_classification_path_boilerplate` so internal route-state templates cannot persist in user-visible shell responses.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: core response finalization + workflow synthesis now treat `workflow_route`/`task_or_info_route` info-vs-task route-classification boilerplate as retry-loop ghost text (including `explicit tool-related phrasing`/`task classification path` variants), local workspace response pass rewrites those templates to direct-answer guidance, and conformance tests now lock both route-name variants.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses ingress-policy preamble boilerplate (`The File List step was blocked before I could finish the answer`, `This is a policy gate, not a web-provider outage`) with dedicated leak counter + zero-threshold gate `web_ingress_policy_preamble_template_suppression` (`ingress_policy_preamble_template_leak_count`) to fail-close policy-preamble contamination in synthesis evidence.
- `V11-WEB-009`: web tooling extraction reliability guard now suppresses blocked tool-trace `Input/Result` scaffolds (`Tool trace complete1 done · 1 blocked`, `Result \`file_list\` was blocked by ingress delivery policy in this runtime lane`) via sanitizer stripping plus dedicated leak counter + zero-threshold gate `web_tool_block_input_result_scaffold_suppression` (`tool_block_input_result_scaffold_leak_count`) to fail-close tool-block trace contamination in synthesis evidence.
- `V11-WEB-008`: web tooling context soak taxonomy contract now normalizes and fail-closes workflow-loop leakage + file-tool-route misdirection counters (`workflow_loop_leak_count`, `file_tool_route_misdirection_count`) from direct and quality-telemetry surfaces, so replay/soak evidence rejects nonzero loop or route-misdirection drift in addition to provider/cache failures.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: workflow-response pass now applies a pre-finalization retry-loop guard (unexpected-state/final-reply-not-rendered/next-actions macro variants) using latest assistant context and direct-answer fallback rewriting, and shell truth-leak regex detection now matches both `from the recorded workflow state` and `from recorded workflow state` loop variants.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: workflow retry-loop detection now explicitly fail-closes repeated runtime capability-surface templates and policy-gate outage templates (`File List step was blocked ... policy gate, not a web-provider outage`) in both repetition-breaker and retry-boilerplate detection paths, with new workflow recovery fixture coverage for policy-gate outage loop blocking.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: workflow failure recovery guard now detects paraphrased retry-loop macro templates via heuristic tagging (workflow unexpected-state + next-actions template bundles, final-reply retry prompts, runtime-capability surface loops, policy-gate outage loops) instead of exact-string-only matching, with new fixture coverage for paraphrased fallback-loop blocking.
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: workflow failure recovery guard now fail-closes exact duplicate assistant-loop responses even when they do not match known retry-template phrases, with bounded duplicate-run detection and fixture coverage (`exact_duplicate_response_loop_blocked`).
- `V11-CLIENT-009`: workflow failure recovery guard now detects alternating A/B retry-loop patterns (non-consecutive duplicate templates) and fail-closes them via `alternating_repeat` loop source classification, with new fixture coverage (`alternating_retry_templates_loop_blocked`).
- `V11-TOOL-006`: parser workspace routing now recognizes `current_working_directory` / `present_working_directory` key families (singular + plural + structured-target aliases) across signal detection, descriptor extraction, and structured target parsing, with typed-probe matrix guard coverage tightened for the new alias set.
- `V11-TOOL-006`: parser workspace routing now also recognizes `_dir` alias families (`workspace_dir|repo_dir|repository_dir|working_dir|current_dir`, singular + plural + structured-target aliases) across signal detection, descriptor extraction, and structured target parsing, with typed-probe matrix guard coverage tightened for the new alias set.
- `V11-ORCH-007`: control-plane Codex template now includes source-backed sub-workflow contracts and lifecycle runtime activation wiring so probe-authority/recovery/synthesis contracts emit deterministic sub-workflow actions instead of metadata-only template labels.

- [ ] `V11-LLM-002.4` — in_progress — 10/10 Completion Intake (2026-04-03, workflow fallback allowlist + repeated unexpected-state response loop-breaker + policy-aware finalization fallback wording increment + forced direct-response fallback emission after synthesis failure when retry-boilerplate/policy-block/repeated-latest signals are present + diagnostic root-cause fallback wording for policy-denied tool turns + fallback metadata scrub (clear stale retry error/reject payload fields) + fallback forcing when invalid excerpt contains retry boilerplate + skipped_not_required draft/latest fallback sanitization when retry boilerplate is detected + same retry-boilerplate sanitization path extended to skipped_test and skipped_missing_model early-return branches + guaranteed non-empty direct-answer fallback when skipped-path draft/latest fallback text is empty + two-stage retry-boilerplate scrub helper applied to both skipped and forced fallback emission paths + skipped-branch fallback helper now marks final_llm_response.used=true when non-empty fallback text is emitted + truthful fallback provenance metadata (`fallback_source` + corrected `fallback_from_existing_draft` semantics for generated vs existing fallback text) + final return-time retry-boilerplate guard that rewrites any surviving loop text and stamps guard provenance + final response presence guard that fills empty response slots with guarded direct-answer fallback (`fallback_source=generated_presence_guard`) + greeting-only fallback routing now prefers human direct-reply copy over policy-heavy boilerplate + exact/near-duplicate fallback output is rewritten to a non-repeating direct-answer variant via normalized similarity matching + stuck-template detection expanded to catch “ask me to continue” and “next actions” boilerplate variants before user-visible emission + non-repeating fallback enforcement now applies a second-stage last-resort direct-reply variant when first alternate still matches latest assistant copy + deterministic variant rotation now selects the first non-matching fallback template against latest assistant copy before last-resort emission + paraphrased retry-macro bundles are now fail-closed via signal-count detection to prevent variant template leakage while preserving plain non-boilerplate retry offers + fallback guard activations now emit deterministic guard-reason metadata and increment a guard-trigger counter for skipped/retry/presence/forced fallback paths + fallback guard metadata now retains a bounded deduplicated reason history array for multi-guard turn diagnostics + fallback guard telemetry now records stage-aware ordered guard events (`fallback_guard_events`) and last-stage metadata (`fallback_guard_last_stage`) for multi-guard auditing + stage-scoped fallback guard counters now emit normalized per-stage telemetry keys (e.g., `fallback_guard_stage_final_retry_guard`) for deterministic aggregate analytics + reason-scoped fallback guard counters now emit normalized per-reason telemetry keys (e.g., `fallback_guard_reason_retry_boilerplate_guard`) for aggregate guard-cause analytics + guard metadata now retains deduplicated stage history (`fallback_guard_stages`) and an explicit `fallback_guard_multi_stage` signal for multi-guard turn classification + `fallback_guard_summary` now publishes deterministic trigger/distinct-reason/distinct-stage/multi-stage snapshots for downstream analytics + summary classification now adds deterministic severity (`low|moderate|high`) and `requires_operator_review` flags based on trigger/stage counts + summary now includes deterministic escalation guidance (`escalation_reason`, `recommended_action`) for operator triage + explicit LLM-controlled tool-routing diagnostic fallback wording for automatic-tool-call questions + policy-blocked workspace/file action fallback wording with explicit lane-permission guidance + explicit non-hardcoded-response diagnostic fallback wording for hard-lock/system-response user probes + deterministic top-improvements fallback wording for system-improvement diagnostic prompts (policy-aware and loop-safe) + deterministic patch-effectiveness diagnostic fallback wording for “are patches working/notice improvements” prompts (policy-aware and loop-safe) + non-repeated fallback hardening for plain direct-answer prompts and patch-effectiveness checks (explicit direct-answer mode and opt-in tool routing) + non-repeated no-policy diagnostic hardening for root-cause/routing/hardcoded probes (explicit workflow-edge wording and direct-answer continuation) + non-repeated direct-answer/workspace-action fallback hardening without policy blocks (explicit plain direct-answer and actionable workspace-path guidance))

## Regression Runbook
- npm run -s ops:backlog:actionable-report
- cargo run -q -p infring-ops-core --bin infring-ops -- backlog-queue-executor run --all=1 --with-tests=1
- npm run -s ops:srs:full:regression
- npm run -s ops:srs:top200:regression
- npm run -s test:ops:srs-contract-runtime-evidence
- ./verify.sh
